Off Calendar Oct-07-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for Defendant. Notice having been given and there being no appearance by Plaintiff nor an objection filed and there being no objection by counsel appearing for Defendant. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Paula Shi, CSR# 13358. (212)

Off Calendar Jul-18-2008 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-07-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Off Calendar Jul-14-2008 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Pltf'S Demand For Production Of Documents, And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions; P/A; Declaration Of Jessica Alexandra; Separate Statement Of Document Demands And Responses In Dispute.
Off Calendar Jul-03-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Jessica Alexandra/Paul Behrend, Esq., appeared for Plaintiff and moving party: Lonnie Lee. No appearance for Defendant

RULING:
Plaintiff Lonnie Lee's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs' Subpoena To Third Party GRANTED; defendants shall produce photographs and other documents pertinent to the request (which are now, or at the time of the deposition of the custodian of the records came into the possession of defendants' counsel) within five days of the date of this order;
Request for sanctions granted in the sum of $1,000.00; imposition of sanctions is stayed for five days from the date of this order; if documents are produced as ordered, the imposition of sanctions shall be permanently stayed.
- Sanctions to run against defendant and his counsel of record. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. Not Reported

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-20-2008 Continued To Jul-21-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc And Motion To Compel Further Responses
Off Calendar Mar-26-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Jessica Alexandra/Paul Behrend, Esq., appeared for plaintiff & moving party: Lonnie Lee, Rosa Jones
Christopher J. Van Son, Esq., appeared for Defendant & opposing party: William B. Phillips

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs Lonnie Lee, Rosa Jones' Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs' Demand For Production Of Documents is moot as responsive documents have been produced. The delay in producing the records was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Defendants, jointly and severally, in the amount of $1,050, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
